# ona_runner (List Resource)

Lists importable Ona runners.

For product context, see [Runner infrastructure](https://ona.com/docs/ona/runners/overview). List resources are used by Terraform Query and require Terraform CLI `>= 1.14`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_runner" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `creator_ids` (List of String) Creator subject IDs to include.
- `runner_providers` (List of String) Runner providers to include. Supported values are `aws_ec2` and `gcp`.
